name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [p \in 1..N |-> state[p] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = idle

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = \*]
          /\ turn' = \*  \* turn may change arbitrarily

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Forks, Philosophers, None

VARIABLES forkOwner, state

(* forkOwner: Forks -> [0..N-1] \cup {None} *)
(* state: Philosophers -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forkOwner \in [Forks -> [0..N-1] \cup {None}]
  /\ state \in [Philosophers -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ \A f \in Forks: forkOwner[f] \in [0..N-1] \cup {None}
  /\ \A p \in Philosophers: state[p] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Init == 
  /\ forkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> None]
  /\ state = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \/ \E p \in Philosophers:
       /\ state[p] = "thinking"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
  \/ \E p \in Philosophers:
       /\ state[p] = "hungry"
       /\ forkOwner[LeftFork(p)] = None
       /\ forkOwner[RightFork(p)] = None
       /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
  \/ \E p \in Philosophers:
       /\ state[p] = "eating"
       /\ forkOwner[LeftFork(p)] = p
       /\ forkOwner[RightFork(p)] = p
       /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = None, ![RightFork(p)] = None]
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forkOwner, state>>

---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag


  flag: [1..N -> BOOLEAN]  (* choosing flag *)

actions
  choose(i) == 




  enter(i) == 
    \A j \in 1..N : 
      (j # i) => 
        (flag[j] /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i)))

  exit(i) == 


  Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N : 
      (choose(i) \/ 
       (enter(i) /\ exit(i)))

  Init == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] = 0 /\ flag[i] = FALSE

  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

  TypeOK == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] \in 0..N
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : flag[i] \in BOOLEAN
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] = 0 \/ (num[i] \in 1..N /\ flag[i] = FALSE)

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count, value

(* Queue is represented as a sequence of length K *)
(* head and tail are indices into the sequence *)
(* count is the number of elements in the queue *)

(* Helper functions *)
IsFull == count = K
IsEmpty == count = 0

(* The queue is a sequence of length K *)
Queue == [i \in 1..K |-> q[i]]

(* The producer action *)
Producer == 
  /\ IsFull = FALSE
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = value]
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

(* The consumer action *)
Consumer == 
  /\ IsEmpty = FALSE
  /\ value' = q[head]
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

(* The Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

(* The initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ K \in Nat
  /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* The specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          /\ readers' = readers \\
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, NULL

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, ballot

Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [p \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ accepted = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]

Prepare(p) ==
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot + 1, value |-> proposers[p].value]]
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot', value |-> NULL]]
  /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]

Promise(a) ==
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[a].ballot, value |-> acceptors[a].value]]
  /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]

Accept(a) ==
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepted' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[a].ballot, value |-> proposers[a].value]]
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]

Chosen(a) ==
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ promises' = promises
  /\ accepted' = accepted
  /\ chosen' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[a].ballot, value |-> proposers[a].value]]

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Prepare(p)
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : Promise(a)
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : Accept(a)
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : Chosen(a)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]  \* 0: not sent, 1: sent, 2: lost

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = 0
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = 1
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 2]
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = 2
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = 2
        /\ retransmitCount[i] >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState' = channelState
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = infected \cup known

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E p \in Pages :
          /\ p \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = Client THEN allocated[c] \cup {p} ELSE allocated[c]]
        \/ \E c \in Clients :
          /\ allocated[c] # {}
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c] :
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}
              /\ allocated' = [c' \in Clients |-> IF c' = c THEN allocated[c'] \ {p} ELSE allocated[c']]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq free

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = m THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
